transition_log.reason: Operator direction change — phase 0 DoD unmet (skill/kypr/ never started). Phase 1 is project initiation and scope-setting; no building.
Phase 1 DoD verified. All requirements, hedl study, ADR-001, and phase 2 backlog complete. Version 0.0.1 released. Phase adversarial review: CONDITIONAL (all findings fixed).

direction_changes.change: Close phase 0 without meeting DoD. Start phase 1 as project initiation (requirements, hedl study, scope definition) rather than building.
